# Ethiopia Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Ethiopia's administrative hierarchy:
> 15 regions, 107 zones, 1,148 woredas.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 15
- Total zones: 107
- Total woredas: 1,148
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-29
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All zones (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-zone.json)
- [All woredas (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-woreda.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Tigray](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/tigray/) — 6 zones, 75 woredas
- [Afar](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/afar/) — 6 zones, 49 woredas
- [Amhara](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/amhara/) — 14 zones, 225 woredas
- [Oromia](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/oromia/) — 22 zones, 349 woredas
- [Somali](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/somali/) — 11 zones, 100 woredas
- [Benishangul-Gumuz](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/benishangul-gumuz/) — 4 zones, 26 woredas
- [Central Ethiopia](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/central-ethiopia/) — 10 zones, 69 woredas
- [South Ethiopia](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/south-ethiopia/) — 12 zones, 93 woredas
- [South West Ethiopia](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/south-west-ethiopia/) — 6 zones, 59 woredas
- [Gambela](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/gambela/) — 4 zones, 15 woredas
- [Harari](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/harari/) — 1 zones, 9 woredas
- [Addis Ababa](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/addis-ababa/) — 1 zones, 11 woredas
- [Dire Dawa](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/dire-dawa/) — 2 zones, 13 woredas
- [Sidama](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sidama/) — 5 zones, 37 woredas
- [Contested](https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/contested/) — 3 zones, 18 woredas

## Per-Region Full Data

- [Tigray](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/tigray.txt)
- [Afar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/afar.txt)
- [Amhara](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/amhara.txt)
- [Oromia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/oromia.txt)
- [Somali](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/somali.txt)
- [Benishangul-Gumuz](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/benishangul-gumuz.txt)
- [Central Ethiopia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/central-ethiopia.txt)
- [South Ethiopia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/south-ethiopia.txt)
- [South West Ethiopia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/south-west-ethiopia.txt)
- [Gambela](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/gambela.txt)
- [Harari](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/harari.txt)
- [Addis Ababa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/addis-ababa.txt)
- [Dire Dawa](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/dire-dawa.txt)
- [Sidama](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/sidama.txt)
- [Contested](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/contested.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (zone), 3 (woreda)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Ethiopia Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/ethiopia-administrative-divisions
